overall.description: A cinematic third-person view of a medieval great hall with high vaulted ceilings and gothic windows, featuring students in robes seated at long wooden tables. The scene is from a video game, with the player character standing in the central aisle observing the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with dining tables

agents.ego_description: player character standing stationary in the central aisle facing the far end of the hall

notable_agents.action: standing still in the central aisle wearing dark robes
student sitting at table reading a book

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
tall pointed-arch windows with stone tracery allowing bright natural light
large circular iron chandelier with multiple candle holders hanging from ceiling
long rectangular wooden dining tables arranged in rows
blue patterned runner rug along the central aisle on stone flooring
decorative banners and framed portraits hanging on stone walls
elevated stone platform at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a grand medieval dining hall, capturing the high vaulted wooden ceiling, gothic windows, and students seated at long tables. The player character stands in the central aisle while other students sit and converse at their tables, with natural light streaming through the tall arched windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant perspective within a grand medieval dining hall, capturing the stillness and scale of the academic environment. It begins with a stationary view of the central aisle where the player character stands, framed by the immense height of the vaulted wooden ceiling. As the gaze lingers, the scene emphasizes the interaction between the students conversing at long wooden tables and the architecture surrounding them. The perspective finally settles on the natural light streaming through the tall gothic windows, which illuminates the vast space and the figures seated within it.
